title: 冬日海滩少女写真：温暖光影下的自然优雅姿态
author: Johnn
prompt:
超逼真的电影感写真，一位女孩（与参考图外观相同）站在寒冷的冬日海滩上。柔和的金色冬日阳光，略带阴沉的天空，自然色调。她穿着一套迷人但不厚重的服装——{"outfit type" "时尚外套或针织毛衣"}，叠穿但优雅，秀发飘逸。主体清晰对焦，眼神清澈而富有表现力。背景是海浪和地平线，但通过浅景深（散景）完全模糊。构图居中，肖像画幅，柔和的风效，微妙的动态，专业镜头，高细节皮肤，自然色彩分级，无强烈阴影，高端杂志风格。

相机：85mm，f/1.8，ISO 200，浅景深
灯光：柔和漫射主光，柔和轮廓光
质量：8k，高细节，照片级真实感，电影感，清晰对焦
情绪：平静，寒冷，宁静，自信的姿态
无畸变，无杂乱背景，无厚重衣物，无伪影，无过度锐化
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic cinematic photoshoot of a girl (same look as reference), standing on a cold winter beach. Soft golden winter light, lightly overcast sky, natural tones. She is wearing an attractive but not-too-heavy outfit — {"outfit type" "stylish coat or knit sweater"}, layered yet elegant, flowing hair. Subject is sharply in focus, eyes clear and expressive. Background is beach waves and horizon but fully blurred with shallow depth of field (bokeh). Composition centered, portrait framing, soft wind effect, subtle motion, professional lens, high detail skin, natural color grading, no harsh shadows, premium magazine style. 

Camera: 85mm, f/1.8, ISO 200, shallow DOF  
Lighting: soft diffused key light, gentle rim light  
Quality: 8k, high-detail, photorealistic, cinematic, crisp focus  
Mood: calm, cold, serene, confident pose  
No distortion, no busy background, no heavy clothing, no artifacts, no oversharpening

title: 健康生活美学：健身、饮食与日常仪式感
author: Keskin
prompt:
2x2 网格生活方式拼贴画，具有简洁的健身和健康美学，现代社交媒体风格，柔和的中性色调。

左上角面板 – 健身必需品，宽高比 5:8

极简主义健身必需品的平铺构图，置于深色瑜伽垫上：部分可见的白色运动鞋、带充电盒的白色无线耳机和两个白色小哑铃。干净、单色的调色板。柔和的自然光线，整洁的布置，营造出平静的健身氛围。

右上角面板 – 健身镜面自拍，宽高比 6:8

一位性感、金发、美丽的成年女性在现代厨房或公寓中对着镜子自拍。她穿着一件深领口的白色背心和浅灰色修身短裤，身材健美。一只手拿着饮料，另一只手拿着手机。自然日光，随意自信的姿态，展现健康生活方式的美学。

左下角面板 – 健康早餐碗，宽高比 3:8

健康酸奶碗的俯视图，整齐地摆放着草莓片、蓝莓、香蕉片、格兰诺拉麦片和粉色酸奶底。明亮、清新的色彩，干净的呈现，柔和的自然光。强调营养和均衡。

右下角面板 – 补水追踪器，宽高比 2:8

特写镜头，一只女性的手握着一个透明的可重复使用水瓶，瓶身印有时间标记。极简背景，简洁构图。突出补水、日常和自我护理。

所有四张图片通过中性色调、自然光、极简主义造型和以平静健康为重点的氛围，营造出和谐统一的感觉。

视觉风格

Instagram 生活方式美学
简洁和极简
受健康和健身启发
柔和的自然光线
高度真实感
编辑式社交媒体外观

相机和构图

平铺、镜面自拍、食物俯拍和特写镜头的组合
平衡的构图
清晰的焦点
一致的色彩分级
无运动模糊

情绪关键词

健康
均衡
励志
干净
现代
自我护理
日常

负面提示词

文字叠加、表情符号、杂乱的背景、刺眼的光线、过饱和、夸张的身体比例、CGI 外观、卡通风格、水印、徽标
prompt_en:
2×2 grid lifestyle collage with a clean fitness and wellness aesthetic, modern social-media style, soft neutral tones.

Top Left Panel – Workout Essentials, ar 5:8

Flat-lay composition of minimalist workout essentials on a dark yoga mat: white sneakers partially visible, white wireless earbuds with case, and two small white dumbbells. Clean, monochrome color palette. Soft natural lighting, tidy arrangement, calm fitness vibe.

Top Right Panel – Fitness Mirror Selfie ar 6:8

A sensual, blond, beautiful adult woman taking a mirror selfie in a modern kitchen or apartment. She wears a white tank top with deep neckline and light gray fitted shorts, athletic and toned physique. One hand holds a drink, the other holds the phone. Natural daylight, casual confident posture, wellness lifestyle aesthetic.

Bottom Left Panel – Healthy Breakfast Bowl 3:8

Overhead shot of a healthy yogurt bowl arranged neatly with sliced strawberries, blueberries, banana slices, granola, and pink yogurt base. Bright, fresh colors, clean presentation, soft natural light. Emphasis on nutrition and balance.

Bottom Right Panel – Hydration Tracker 2:8

Close-up of a clear reusable water bottle with time markers printed on the side, held by a woman’s hand. Minimal background, clean composition. Highlights hydration, routine, and self-care.

All four images feel cohesive through neutral tones, natural light, minimalist styling, and a calm wellness-focused mood.

Visual Style

Instagram lifestyle aesthetic
Clean and minimal
Wellness and fitness inspired
Soft natural lighting
High realism
Editorial social-media look

Camera & Composition

Mix of flat-lay, mirror selfie, overhead food shot, and close-up
Balanced framing
Sharp focus
Consistent color grading
No motion blur

Mood Keywords

Healthy
Balanced
Motivational
Clean
Modern
Self-care
Daily routine

Negative Prompt

Text overlays, emojis, cluttered backgrounds, harsh lighting, oversaturation, exaggerated body proportions, CGI look, cartoon style, watermarks, logos

title: 科幻名舰微缩场景模型
author: ai.gezgini
prompt:
这是一个特写视角的 Millennium Falcon 宇宙飞船微缩模型场景。照片是从飞船稍上方以 3/4 的角度拍摄的。这个手工制作的模型将飞船主体及其周围的小型机库区域完整地呈现在画面中。飞船的一侧被切开，内部层次结构清晰可见。
内部空间包括驾驶舱、生活区、休息室、走廊和机器舱等，所有细节都刻画得极为细致；模型上配备了微型控制面板
prompt_en:
Filmlerin ikonik araçlarını minyatür sahneye (diorama) dönüştürmek artık çok kolay 🎬
Nano Banana Pro + basit bir prompt yeterli.
Hayal ettiğini sahneye dönüştürmek birkaç satır 🚀
Millenium Falcon için Prompt (tüm promptlar ALT kısmında)
👇
Millennium Falcon’un yer aldığı yakın plan bir masaüstü uzay gemisi dioraması. Fotoğraf, gemiye hafif yukarıdan 3/4 açıyla bakıyor. El yapımı minyatür model, ana gövdeyi ve çevresindeki küçük hangar alanını kadrajın büyük kısmında gösteriyor. Geminin bir yüzü kesit şeklinde açık; iç katmanlar net biçimde görülüyor.
İç mekânda kokpit, yaşam alanı, dinlenme odaları, koridorlar ve makine dairesi kat kat detaylandırılmış; minyatür kontrol panelleri, koltuklar, kablolar ve Star Wars’a özgü endüstriyel detaylar yer alıyor. Dış kısımda uzay limanı platformu, servis araçları, sandıklar ve teknik ekipmanlar bulunuyor.
İçeride ve dışarıda Han Solo, Chewbacca, mürettebat ve bazı droid figürleri mevcut; figürler net ama diorama ölçeğinde. Sığ alan derinliği; ön plan net, arka plan yumuşak flu. Hafif sıcak, sinematik hangar ışığı; yüksek detaylı, stüdyo çekimi bilim kurgu dioraması, ultra gerçekçi.

title: 3D等距微缩叙事场景生成器
author: VoxcatAI
prompt:
为我生成一张极具细节和叙事感的【3D 等距微缩模型图 (Isometric Diorama)】。画面展示的核心空间主题是「{这里填入主题}」，整体以一个漂浮在空中的“故事方块 (Story Cube)”呈现。
视角必须是严格的 45 度等距视角（Isometric View），像 3D 建模软件里的等距预览那样，没有传统透视缩放。将房间或建筑的前墙和/或天花板整齐切开，从外部清晰看到内部结构、家具布置和生活痕迹，就像一个被掀开外壳的微缩模型房间。画面中可以安排一个正在发生的小动作，例如：一只猫蜷缩在沙发上睡觉、电脑屏幕正亮着、炉子里缓缓冒出烟雾等，让空间看起来“正在被使用”。
室内设计风格要与「{主题}」高度一致：如果是炼金术士的秘密小店，就要有拥挤的药剂瓶、羊皮纸卷、古书、炼金器具；如果是哥特式吸血鬼的卧室，就有尖拱窗、深色天鹅绒帷幔、烛台和古董家具；如果是废弃太空站指挥舱，就充满老旧的控制台、闪烁的屏幕、悬挂的电缆和漂浮的小工具。内部空间必须采用“有组织的混乱 (Organized Clutter)”美学：高密度、高细节的杂物和个人物品遍布房间各处，让画面在每个角落都有值得细看的小细节。可以加入一个小比例、风格化的人物或 Q 版角色，在房间里做符合主题的日常行为，为画面增加故事感和尺度感。
光线采用柔和的体积光 (Volumetric Lighting)：主要光源可以来自一扇窗户、天花板灯、电脑显示器、魔法阵、炉火或霓虹灯，根据「{主题}」自行匹配。光线需要在空气中形成可见的光束和轻微的雾感，让房间看起来温暖、治愈或略带神秘。材质表现要有 3D 渲染的精致感（类似 Blender/Cinema4D/Voxel 风格），强调木材纹理、金属反光、玻璃通透感以及布艺的褶皱与柔软度，让整个等距空间像一件可以被拾起端详的精致微缩模型。画面为横版 16:9，高分辨率，细节丰富。

title: 水晶谱架立于水畔，星辉脉络交织，幻境神秘璀璨。
author: テルさん
prompt: 请创作一张水晶谱架的图片。谱架内部雕刻着精美的纹路，工艺精湛，如同珠宝般反射着光芒。它被放置在水边，营造出一种神秘的景象。
prompt_en: クリスタル の譜面台 中には、繊細な技術による繊細な 脈が刻まれており、狩りを宝石のような反射を見せる。 水辺に置かれていて、 神秘的な。 光景が漂わせる そんな画像を作ってください

title: 红黄两色手绘肖像画插图
author: @cnyzgkc
prompt:
使用我上传的图片。用红色和黄色钢笔在笔记本纸上绘制一幅手绘肖像插图，灵感来自涂鸦艺术和漫画注释。保持人物的完整形象，线条富有表现力，风格自然流畅。
手势，醒目的轮廓光晕，
周围有手写笔记，逼真的笔触纹理，4K分辨率。
prompt_en:
Use my uploaded image. Generate a hand-drawn portrait illustration in red and yellow pen on notebook paper, inspired by doodle art and comic annotations.Keep full likeness of the subject, expressive lines, spontaneous
gestures, bold outline glow,
handwritten notes around, realistic pen stroke texture,4K resolution.

title: 科幻风格人物肖像写真
author: Heisenberg

title: 服装产品提取精修
author: Leader AI
prompt: 这是一张需要专业级服装精修的产品图。将图中主体提取出来，彻底去除所有褶皱、折痕和变形，去除与衣物无关的配件，如衣架，模特等，呈现服装熨烫平整、完美悬挂的理想状态。完美保持服装的原始颜色、面料纹理（如牛仔布、丝绸、羊毛）、版型轮廓和所有设计细节（如纽扣、缝线、口袋）。画面为纯白色背景，光线为柔和均匀的影棚光，无任何阴影。最终效果达到顶级电商产品主图标准。

title: 可爱少女贴纸套装
author: ShreyaYadav___
prompt:
提示：创建一套贴纸，需完整保留所提供图像中女性的原始面部特征。不得修改面部，专注于面部结构、眼睛、眉毛、鼻子、嘴巴及表情的超写实细节。最终面部必须真实自然，不可卡通化。她拥有长而蓬松的头发。

1. 妆容：保留原始面部：我们将尽可能贴近原图，保留您的面部结构、眼睛、眉毛、鼻子、嘴巴及表情，以维持自然感与独特性，同时调整色调使其更柔和：
眼睛：略微减弱猫眼眼线的锐利感，调整为贴近睫毛线的细线，营造更柔和的观感，同时保持眼部轮廓清晰。
眼影：使用自然色调，如浅棕色、桃色或米色。
眉毛：保持原始眉形
prompt_en:
Use this Prompt For Sticker Set Creation.
Gemini Ai Nano Banana 3 Pro ✨

Prompt ⤵️

Prompt: Create a sticker set maintaining 100% of the woman's original facial features from the provided image. Do not alter the face, focusing on ultra-realistic details of the facial structure, eyes, eyebrows, nose, mouth, and expression. The final face must be realistic, not cartoon-like. She has long, voluminous hair.
1. Makeup: Maintain Original Face: We will preserve the structure of your face, eyes, eyebrows, nose, mouth,and expression as closely as possible to the original image to maintain naturalness and uniqueness, while adjusting the tone to be softer:
Eyes: Slightly reduce the sharpness of the Cat Eye eyeliner to a thin line close to the lash line for a softer look, while still maintaining eye definition.
Eyeshadow: Use natural tones like light brown, peach, or beige.
Eyebrows: Original shape, but brushed up to look softer and more natural.
Lips: Glossy, pink-tinted, nude-pink, or coral-toned lipstick/tint to make the lips look full and moisturized. Focus on a bright but not overly intense look.
2. Hairstyle: Natural Voluminous Long Hair: Her hair is long and flowing, but the styling will emphasize natural volume and movement. Soft, natural waves.
3. Outfit:
Attire: A white open-back bodysuit paired with distressed, faded blue denim shorts.
Shoes: Elegant, simple open-toe flat sandals.
4.Accessories: Styled freely and fittingly for each scene. 4. Poses & Sticker Elements: Poses: Various poses such as waving, jumping, walking playfully, reading a book, holding up a sign, cheering with both hands, stretching, or making a celebratory gesture, to create a cheerful and friendly atmosphere. Decoration: Include elements like small rainbows, sparkling stars, clear bubbles, hearts, balloons, or light-colored dots to decorate and enhance the fun of each sticker scene.
https://t.co/SsVnXsGBGZ: Thin black border around the sticker. Use a modern, rounded 'Itim' style font for the text. Text: Add short emotional phrases written in a cute, beautiful Thai script near the sticker (no speech bubbles/text boxes):

Hello
LoveU
Bye
Cool
Yes
Thank You
Sorry
Ok
No
So cute
SO GOOD
Good Luck
GOOD Night
GOOD Bye
555
Oh
HBD
OMG
Hapyy
Hi
6.Guidelines: Do not include a text box. Ensure balanced composition with sufficient white space—not cluttered. Match the pose to the text.

title: 四名年轻女性身穿皇马球衣在体育场看台合影
author: Melisa♡

title: 橙色羽毛礼服高定时尚写真模板
author: cinema 🎥

title: 身着西装的女子摆出嫌犯照姿势
author: @xmiiru_

title: 电影质感男性肖像：烟雾火花中的沉思瞬间
author: Taaruk
prompt: 一位粗犷的年轻男子，留着浅浅的胡茬，身穿深色加厚夹克，置身于烟雾弥漫的氛围中，空气中漂浮着发光的余烬火花。他略微向上看，表情严肃而内省。低调布光，对比强烈：温暖的橙色火光照亮了他脸部的一侧，而另一侧则是冷峻的蓝灰色阴影。浅景深，柔和的薄雾，体积光，漂浮的粒子，电影级调色，超逼真的皮肤纹理，锐利的面部细节，深色背景，电影海报美学，高写实度，8K 分辨率。
prompt_en: A dramatic cinematic portrait of a rugged young man with light stubble, wearing a dark padded jacket, standing in a smoky atmosphere filled with glowing ember sparks floating through the air. He looks slightly upward with a serious, introspective expression. Low-key lighting with strong contrast: warm orange firelight illuminating one side of his face and cool blue-gray shadows on the other. Shallow depth of field, soft haze, volumetric lighting, floating particles, cinematic color grading, ultra-realistic skin texture, sharp facial details, dark background, movie-poster aesthetic, high realism, 8K resolution.

title: 光影魅惑的K-pop时尚特写
author: BubbleBrain
prompt: 这是一张韩国高级时装大片的特写，捕捉了一位惊艳的K-pop偶像转瞬即逝的瞬间。一束狭窄的硬光以45度角照射在她的脸上，在光影之间划出一道清晰的分界线。她用一根手指轻按着微张的、涂着亮泽唇彩的嘴唇，做出一个诱人的“嘘”的手势。她双眼微微睁大，目光坚定而无所畏惧地直视着镜头。她的妆容是典型的K-pop舞台妆：闪亮的眼影颗粒在光线下熠熠生辉，肌肤如玻璃般光滑，泛着淡淡的汗光，唇色则呈现出渐变效果。她乌黑的秀发在风中飘动，发丝灵动地飞扬。背景漆黑一片，曝光不足。胶片颗粒感、哑光质感、浅景深、光束中微妙的棱镜折射彩虹、电影般的对比，以及一种冷艳而危险的魅力。
prompt_en:
I learn the lighting from @underwoodxie96
---prompt---
A Korean high-fashion editorial close-up of a stunning K-pop idol, captured in a fleeting moment. A single narrow hard light beam strikes her face from a 45-degree angle, creating a sharp cut between light and deep shadow. She is making a seductive "hush" gesture with one finger pressed against her glossy, slightly parted lips. Her eyes are heavy-lidded and locked onto the camera with an intense, unbothered gaze. Her makeup is K-pop stage style: glittering eyeshadow particles catching the light, glass skin with a faint sweat sheen, and gradient lips. Her black hair is caught mid-motion by the wind, strands lifting dynamically. The background is pitch black and underexposed. Analog film grain, matte texture, shallow depth of field, subtle prism refraction rainbow inside the light beam, cinematic contrast, cool and dangerous allure.

title: 三体科幻雕塑化呈现

以 45° 俯视角度呈现的一件精细动态雕塑，置于方形深色木质底座之上。中央主体是 [插入核心符号/主题] 的概念化表现，由 [插入材质美学] 制作而成，旨在捕捉叙事的精髓。围绕或与中心互动的是动态的机械元素：[插入动态动作/机制]。底座细致地描绘了 [插入氛围场景/地形]，其中包含微型的 [

title: 雪林情侣嬉戏抓拍瞬间
author: Harboriis
prompt: 一片白雪皑皑的森林中，一对年轻情侣在宽阔的林间小路上嬉戏打雪仗，构成了一幅充满活力的冬日场景。相机位置较低，略微向右倾斜，正对着这对情侣，捕捉到了动感和随性。前景中，一位年轻女子身穿长款的{"coat color" "浅棕色"}泰迪熊外套，头戴白色针织帽，下身是白色阔腿裤，戴着保暖手套，脚穿米色靴子。她正被一团雪击中，姿态生动活泼，一只手臂微微抬起，脸上流露出惊喜与快乐交织的表情。背景中，一位年轻男子身穿蓝色牛仔裤、棕色靴子，内搭米色和白色条纹的浅色毛衣，头戴白色毛线帽，正处于投掷雪球的动作中，他的身影略显模糊，以强调动感。两人都被高大、深色的松树环绕，松树上覆盖着薄薄的雪，营造出一种温馨、电影般的氛围。地面完全被新鲜、未被触碰的雪覆盖。整体氛围活泼、青春、愉悦，充满冬日的活力。光线是柔和的环境日光，透过森林树冠漫射开来。照片采用浅景深（f/2.8）拍摄，前景中的女子是焦点，背景略微模糊，以突出动感和氛围。色彩自然柔和，温暖的米色和棕色调与冷白色和森林绿色形成对比。构图强调活动、情感联系和视觉叙事，非常适合高质量的编辑或生活方式类冬季摄影。
prompt_en: A dynamic winter scene in a snowy forest, featuring a young couple playfully throwing show at each other on a wide forest path. The camera is positioned low and slightly angled to the right, facing the couple, capturing motion and spontaneity. In the foreground, a young woman in a long, {"coat color" "light brown"} teddy coat, white knit bat, white wide-leg pants, warm mittens, and beige boots reacts as a cloud of snow hits her, her posture animated and lively, one arm slightly raised, showing a mix of surprise and joy on her face. In the background, a young man in blue jeans, brown boots, light sweater with beige and white stripes, and a white beanie is mid-throw, his figure slightly blurred to emphasize motion. Both are surrounded by tall, dark pine trees dusted with snow, creating a cozy, cinematic atmosphere. The ground is completely covered with fresh, untouched snow. The overall mood is playful, youthful, and joyful, with an energetic winter vibe. Lighting is soft, ambient daylight, diffused through the forest canopy. The photo is captured with a shallow depth of field (f/2.8), focusing on the woman in the foreground while slightly blurring the background to highlight movement and atmosphere. Colors are natural and muted, with warm beige and brown tones contrasting against cold whites and forest greens. The composition emphasizes activity, emotional connection, and visual storytelling, ideal for high quality editorial or lifestyle winter photography.

title: 迪士尼圣诞夜人像精修
author: 岚叔
prompt: 请使用我的参考图片。请不要更改人物的面部特征——保持所有面部细节完全一致。创作一个高度细节化的、充满节日氛围的迪士尼主题公园夜景画面，时间设定在圣诞节期间。画面前景中有一位年轻女性，她站在画面中央。她戴着红色毛茸茸的耳罩，穿着一件绣有多个微笑米老鼠图案的绿色毛绒夹克；黑色高腰浅蓝色牛仔裤搭配黑色腰带；手中拿着一个带有金色配件的红色小挎包。她的左手拿着一个穿着红色圣诞服装、带有白色装饰和绿色围巾的米妮老鼠玩偶，同时做出俏皮的“和平手势”，嘴唇微微撅起，呈现出可爱的亲吻姿
prompt_en:
试了一个：第一次觉得z-image 赢了😂：
左：z-image
右：nano banana pro
提示词：Using my reference image. DO NOT CHANGE THE FACE — keep all facial features exactly the same. Create a highly detailed, festive nighttime scene at a Disney theme park during Christmas season. A young woman stands in the foreground, centered in the frame. She wears red fluffy earmuffs, a green fuzzy jacket embroidered with multiple smiling Mickey Mouse faces, a black crop top revealing a subtle navel piercing, high-waisted light blue jeans with a black belt, and carries a small red crossbody purse with gold hardware. In her left hand, she holds a plush Minnie Mouse doll dressed in a red Santa outfit with white trim and a green scarf, while making a playful peace sign near her face and puckering her lips in a cute kiss pose. A delicate gold necklace with a small pendant adorns her neck.
The shot is an eye-level, straight-on medium portrait from the waist up, captured with a Fujifilm professional camera, using shallow depth of field to keep her in perfect focus while softly blurring the background. Behind her, a classic green lamppost wrapped in Christmas garland, twinkling warm white lights, red ribbons, gold ornaments, and red baubles decorates the scene. To the right, a glowing carousel with a white canopy and colorful string lights illuminates the festive night. The ground is paved brick, and distant bokeh lights from park attractions create a magical atmosphere.
The overall mood is joyful, whimsical, and full of holiday spirit — vibrant colors, warm golden lighting, cinematic composition, photorealistic style, and 8K ultra-HD quality.

prompt_en: Let’s create a 4-panel manga with Nano Banana Pro: “{argument name="title_en" default="A Day in the Life of a Clumsy Elf"}.”

title: 街头滑板少女时尚写真生成预设
author: TJ

title: 复古游戏机大修场景
author: Adam也叫吉米
prompt:
这个场景将一台巨大的旧款 Game Boy 变成了一个繁忙的维修现场。  
一张广角、带有“倾斜位移”效果的微距照片，展示了一台巨大的灰色复古 Game Boy 手持游戏机正在一群微型技术人员的修缮之下。游戏机周围搭建着复杂的脚手架。一台微型起重机正将一块发光的 LCD 屏幕组件吊放到指定位置；其他微小的工作人员正用巨大的棉签清洁卡带槽，而一组焊工则在“A”和“B”按键附近的裸露电路板上进行焊接作业。游戏机的塑料外壳上布满了真实的磨损痕迹和划痕。整个维修环境就像一个杂乱的电子工作台，采用了浅景深和具有电影质感的光影效果。-- 编码格式：AR 4:3 -
prompt_en:
1. 电子复古风——复古游戏机大修
这个场景将一个巨大的旧 Game Boy 变成了繁忙的维修工地。
A wide-angle, tilt-shift macro photograph of a colossal vintage gray Game Boy handheld console being overhauled by a swarm of miniature technicians. The console is surrounded by intricate scaffolding. A miniature crane is lifting a glowing replacement LCD screen component into place. Other tiny workers use enormous cotton swabs to clean the cartridge slot, while a team welders works on exposed circuit boards near the 'A' and 'B' buttons. The plastic shows realistic wear and scratches. The setting is a cluttered electronics workbench. Shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting. --ar 4:3 --v 6.0

title: K-Pop偶像报纸时尚概念
author: @BubbleBrain

title: 彩铅纹理时尚插画红唇少女
author: @Naiknelofar788
prompt: 高度详细的数字线稿肖像插画 仅使用上传的参考图片作为身份和面部比例参考。戴着黄色报童帽和相配的黄色围巾，黑框眼镜，鲜艳的红唇，波浪卷发 绿松石色/青色，洋红色/粉色，黄色/浅棕色，具有柔和阴影的超写实渲染，彩色铅笔纹理效果，时尚插画风格，专业数字艺术，干净的白色背景。
prompt_en: Highly detailed digital line art portrait illustration Use the uploaded reference image only for identity and facial proportions. Wearing a yellow newsboy hat and matching yellow scarf, black-rimmed glasses, bright red lips, wavy hair Turquoise/cyan, Magenta/pink, Yellow/light brown, hyper-realistic rendering with soft shadows, colored pencil texture effect, fashion illustration style, professional digital art, clean white background.

title: 云朵耳机梦幻写真
author: Oogie
prompt: 一位年轻女性的特写侧面肖像，她双眼紧闭，神情平静安详。她肤色白皙，双颊泛红，留着深棕色长发和刘海。她身穿一件浅棕色泰迪熊仿皮草外套，戴着一副超现实耳机，耳罩由白色云朵制成，配有棕色皮革头带。背景是柔和模糊的明亮蓝色天空和云朵。光线明亮，是自然的日光，营造出柔和空灵的感觉。图像景深较浅，焦点清晰地集中在她的脸上，呈现出梦幻、艺术、超现实、超写实的风格。
prompt_en: A close-up profile portrait of a young woman with her eyes closed and a calm, serene expression. She has a fair complexion with rosy cheeks and long dark brown hair with bangs. She is wearing a light brown teddy faux-fur coat and surreal headphones, where the ear cups are made of white clouds with a brown leather headband. The background is a softly blurred bright blue sky with clouds. The lighting is bright, natural daylight, creating a soft and airy feel. The image has a shallow depth of field with sharp focus on her face, in a dreamy, artistic, surreal, photorealistic style.

title: 多风格艺术肖像创作指南
author: gemini_prompts
prompt:
“超写实的 8K 中景肖像。使用上传照片中的面部轮廓。  
采用温暖、浪漫的“黄金时刻”美学风格——灵感来自《Vogue Fine Arts》与意大利绘画工作室的结合。  
**发型：** 柔软的波浪卷，自然蓬松的质感，头发分中或侧分，发丝带有温暖的金色光泽。  
**妆容：** 光泽莹润的肌肤，金色高光，桃色眼影，长而蓬松的睫毛，玫瑰色调的水彩腮红，光泽感十足的桃粉色唇彩。  
**服装：** 奶油色或柔和米色的露肩针织衫，或白色披肩式上
prompt_en:
Trend 234
Pick one sketch prompt for you😍👩‍🎨🎨
Use #Gemini nano banana 🍌 pro for best results!!
Prompt 1:
"Ultra-realistic 8K mid-shot portrait. Use the exact face from the uploaded photo.
Warm, romantic "golden-hour muse" aesthetic - Vogue Fine Arts x Italian painting studio.
Hair: soft loose waves, natural volume, middle/side part, warm golden glow on strands.
Makeup: dewy luminous skin, golden highlighter, peach eyeshadow, long fluffy lashes, rosy watercolor blush, glossy peach-rose lips.
Outfit: cream/soft beige off-shoulder knit or white draped top (not black, not oversized). Exposed collarbone. Thin gold necklace, tiny pearl earrings, subtle gold rings.
Background: one HUGE colorful oil painting of her face, filling the entire background.
Soft warm brushstrokes, golden/peach/blush tones, creamy texture, flowing hair strokes, Renaissance-meets-modern glow. Rich, emotional, romantic.
Pose: mid-shot, slightly off-center. Exposed shoulder toward camera. Hands gently touching arm/table. Head slightly down, eyes softly lifted. Dreamy, warm, romantic expression.
Studio: warm artist's workspace - wooden desk, jars with brushes, oil paints, smeared warm pigments, golden sunlight from the side, dust in the light, reflections on wet oil paint.
Lighting: golden-hour soft warmth, gentle shadows, glowing skin + glowing painting.
Camera: Canon EOS R5, 50mm f/1.2, f/1.2, ISO 160. Luminous skin, creamy tones, painterly softness.
Exclude: no charcoal, no dark mood, no black clothing, entirely new warm aesthetic."
Prompt 2:
"Convert the Uploaded image into a Highly detailed sketch-style illustration  in a powerful yet peaceful pose.
Uploaded image with a beautiful dress well-defined same pose a exuding devotion and inner strength. The same dress with soft shading and artistic texture. The entire artwork is created with a fine ink-sketch effect, with loose scribble lines around the figure, giving it an artistic, hand-drawn look. Minimalist white textured background."
Prompt 3:
"Illustrated portrait of a thoughtful young woman(face exactly same as the reference image) sitting cross-legged on a ruled notebook background.
Bold hand-drawn doodles-arrows, sparks, scribbled words like "FOCUS!" and "CREATE!"-float around her.
Soft warm shading on her face, loose wavy hair, silver earrings catching the light. Casual earthy-toned outfit, relaxed posture, expressive eyes looking upward as if forming an idea.
Clean, modern comic-sketch style"
Prompt 4:
"A highly detailed digital painting portrait of a young woman(face exactly same as the reference image) with curly hair and an original, natural-looking face. The face structure and features must match 100% with the uploaded reference photo. She is smiling joyously with her eyes gently closed, wearing a bright red top. She is surrounded by an abundance of vibrant, meticulously detailed flowers in shades of pink, red, and cream. Soft white line-art butterflies flutter gracefully around her. The background is a rich teal/blue, with the uplifting text "Everything happens for a reason" floating elegantly above her head. The overall style is painterly, vibrant, and maximalist, filled with rich textures, lush floral elements, and dreamy lighting."

title: 奢华女性与跑车私人飞机写真
author: 𝗦𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮

title: 圣诞天使设计课程宣传图
author: いにしえ@AI Creator｜Will Oldgram
prompt:
metadata:
title: "Nano Banana Pro 设计课程吸睛图 - 圣诞天使版"
model_context: "季节性圣诞广告与可爱动漫美学相结合"

image_structure:
composition_type: "全背景 + 右侧人物 + 左侧装饰文字"
visual_flow: "左侧文字（季节性福利）-> 右侧人物（AI 生成结果）"

layers:
layer_background_full:
shape: "覆盖整个屏幕。"
content: "奢华的圣诞室内场景。"
details:
elements: "装饰着发光灯饰的圣诞树、堆积如山的包装礼物、温暖的壁炉光芒、背景中的散景光斑。"
atmosphere: "温暖、神奇、节日气氛浓厚，带有柔和的雪花或闪光效果。"
focus: "浅景深，模糊背景元素以突出前景。"

layer_visual_right:
shape: "占据屏幕右半部分。"
content: "身着圣诞服装的日系卡哇伊动漫天使角色。"
style: "2D 赛璐珞风格动漫艺术，高细节，温暖而鲜艳的色彩。"
details:
subject: "一个长着巨大羽毛天使翅膀的可爱动漫女孩。"
appearance:
hair: "银色或铂金色头发。"
eyes: "大而闪亮的红色或绿色眼睛。"
clothing: "一件带有毛皮饰边、丝带和铃铛的节日圣诞老人风格连衣裙。头上戴着一个小光环或圣诞帽。"
pose: "温暖地微笑着，向左侧的文字做出展示姿势。"
vfx: "翅膀和光环周围有发光的粒子和柔和的光线。"

layer_typography_left:
location: "左对齐，位于中左区域。"
container: "主文本周围有精致、装饰性的金色边框或卷轴边框（圣诞饰品风格）。"
elements:
- type: "标题/钩子"
text: "{"header text" "AI で彩る、最高の冬。"}"
style: "主标题上方的小号金色或白色文字。"

- type: "主标题"
text: "{"main title" "Christmas\nDesign Course"}"
style: "大号、华丽、金色或红色渐变字体，带白色轮廓和阴影。极具装饰性。"

- type: "副标题/福利"
text: "{"subtitle" "With Nano Banana Pro,\nseasonal materials are freely available!"}"
style: "主标题下方较小的白色或金色文字。"

- type: "底部标语"
text: "{"bottom tagline" "Pro-level brilliance even for beginners"}"
style: "底部的小文字，可能在丝带横幅元素上。"

style_and_tone:
art_style: "节日动漫插画与奢华背景"
color_palette:
primary: "红色、绿色、金色"
secondary: "白色（雪/翅膀）、暖色调光线"
quality_tags:
- "高分辨率"
- "动漫主视觉图"
- "细节丰富的背景"
- "氛围感灯光"
- "节日气氛"
prompt_en:
metadata:
title: "Nano Banana Pro Design Course Eyecatch - Christmas Angel Ver."
model_context: "Seasonal Christmas Advertisement mixed with Cute Anime aesthetics"

image_structure:
composition_type: "Full Background + Right Character + Left Decorated Text"
visual_flow: "Left Text (Seasonal Benefit) -> Right Character (AI Generation Result)"

layers:
layer_background_full:
shape: "Covers the entire screen."
content: "Luxurious Christmas interior scene."
details:
elements: "Decorated Christmas trees with glowing lights, piles of wrapped presents, warm fireplace glow, bokeh lights in the background."
atmosphere: "Warm, magical, festive, with soft falling snow or glitter effect."
focus: "Shallow depth of field, blurring the background elements to make the foreground pop."

layer_visual_right:
shape: "Occupies the right half of the screen."
content: "Japanese Kawaii Anime Angel character in Christmas outfit."
style: "2D Cel-shaded anime art, high detail, warm and vibrant colors."
details:
subject: "A cute anime girl with large feathered angel wings."
appearance:
hair: "Silver or platinum blonde hair."
eyes: "Large, sparkling red or green eyes."
clothing: "A festive Santa Claus style dress with fur trim, ribbons, and bells. A small halo or Santa hat on her head."
pose: "Smiling warmly, making a presenting gesture towards the text on the left."
vfx: "Glowing particles and soft light around her wings and halo."

layer_typography_left:
location: "Left-aligned, positioned in the middle-left area."
container: "Elaborate, decorative golden frame or scroll border (Christmas ornament style) around the main text."
elements:
- type: "Header/Hook"
text: "{"ヘッダーテキスト" "AIで彩る、最高の冬。"}"
style: "Small gold or white text above the main title."

- type: "Main Title"
text: "{"メインタイトル" "クリスマス\nデザイン講座"}"
style: "Large, ornate, gold or red gradient font with white outline and shadow. Highly decorative."

- type: "Sub-Title/Benefit"
text: "{"サブタイトル" "Nano Banana Proで\n季節の素材も自由自在！"}"
style: "Smaller white or gold text below the main title."

- type: "Bottom Tagline"
text: "{"ボトムタグライン" "初心者でもプロ級の輝き"}"
style: "Small text at the bottom, maybe on a ribbon banner element."

style_and_tone:
art_style: "Festive Anime Illustration with Luxurious Background"
color_palette:
primary: "Red, Green, Gold"
secondary: "White (Snow/Wings), Warm light colors"
quality_tags:
- "High resolution"
- "Anime key visual"
- "Detailed background"
- "Atmospheric lighting"
- "Festive"

title: 高端商务领袖肖像定制服务
author: Shanvi
prompt: 请以附件图片为精确的面部参考，创作一张高端、有思想领袖气质的专业大头照。保持逼真的面部结构、皮肤纹理和表情。穿着简约、优质的商务服装。背景为中性纯色，带柔和渐变。采用柔和的电影级灯光，并带有微妙的轮廓光。
prompt_en: Using the attached image as the exact facial reference, create a high end thought leader aesthetic professional headshot. Maintain realistic facial structure, skin texture, and expression. Dress in minimalist, premium business attire. Neutral solid background with soft gradient. Soft cinematic lighting, subtle rim light

title: 红发女性多角度戏剧性人像摄影预设
author: ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI

title: 跨物种情感共鸣特写
author: Kol Tregaskes
prompt: 一张人类与外星人混合体面部的超近距离特写，脸上流露出淡淡的悲伤之情：混合体的面部特征非常细致——鳞片状的皮肤与人类的毛孔完美融合；异色的眼睛中带有反光效果的瞳孔，仿佛映照出星云般的图案；泪水也呈现出真实的折射效果。在那些鳞片状结构上嵌入细小的文字，内容用外星文字和英文书写（“情感超越种族界限”）。请确保在睫毛、血管网络等细节部分没有任何模糊现象，并使用戏剧性的侧光效果来突出画面。
prompt_en:
Hey Nano Banana Pro, create an image:
Ultra-close-up of a human-alien hybrid face expressing quiet sorrow: detailed hybrid features like scaled skin blending into human pores, heterochromatic eyes with reflective pupils showing a starry nebula, and tears with realistic refraction. Embed tiny text on the scales in alien script and English ("Emotion Transcends Species"). Push for no blurring in fine details like eyelashes or vein networks, under dramatic side lighting.

title: 巴黎咖啡馆金色时光写真
author: Key Alves

title: 街霸2成沟通障碍
author: 布留川英一 / Hidekazu Furukawa
prompt: 使用 Nano Banana Pro 提升第 9 页的细节表现
prompt_en: 9ページ目を Nano Banana Pro で高詳細化

title: 火焰雕塑：燃烧物体的毁灭美学与结构艺术
author: Alexandra Aisling
prompt: 一个 {argument name="object" default="[物体]"} 悬浮在空中，凝固在点燃的那一刻。火焰和烟雾以坚实的雕塑形式存在，以物体自身转化后的材质，精细地呈现出 {argument name="fire architecture" default="[火焰结构 / 烟雾结构 / 热量模式]"}。燃烧揭示了 [焦炭层、灰烬结构、余烬网络、热裂内层]，具有清晰的热力学逻辑。火焰包含 [内部条纹、可见为颜色变化的温度梯度、氧气流模式]。材料转化被记录下来：[焦黑的边缘、卷曲的表面、结晶的糖、焦糖化的蛋白质]。调色板从 [原始材料色调] 逐渐过渡到 [焦炭黑]，再到 [余烬橙和灰烬灰]。物体孤立，凝固的火焰本身发出戏剧性的明暗对比光线。毁灭即建筑。超高分辨率，将暴力化为美，法医摄影与美术的结合。
prompt_en: A single {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"} suspended in space, frozen at the moment of ignition. Flames and smoke exist as solid sculptural forms, fully detailed {argument name="fire architecture" default="[FIRE ARCHITECTURE / SMOKE STRUCTURES / HEAT PATTERNS]"} rendered in the object's own transformed material. The combustion reveals [CHAR LAYERS, ASH STRUCTURES, EMBER NETWORKS, HEAT-CRACKED INTERIORS] with clear thermodynamic logic. Flames contain [INTERNAL STRIATIONS, TEMPERATURE GRADIENTS VISIBLE AS COLOR SHIFTS, OXYGEN FLOW PATTERNS]. Material transformation documented: [BLACKENED EDGES, CURLING SURFACES, CRYSTALLIZED SUGAR, CARAMELIZED PROTEINS]. Palette transitions from [ORIGINAL MATERIAL TONES] through [CHAR BLACKS] to [EMBER ORANGES AND ASH GREYS]. Isolated object, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting from the frozen flame itself. Destruction as architecture. Ultra-high resolution, violence made beautiful, forensic photography meets fine art.

title: 精致多层3D浮雕文化市井微缩模型
author: @0x00_Krypt
prompt: [文化/地点] [日常生活场景] 的精细 3D 浮雕立体模型。多层构图，中景为具有 [建筑细节] 的 [建筑类型]，前景充满了在 [食品市场] 的 [身着传统服饰的人物]，小路上有 [当地交通工具]，[装饰性文化物品] 和 [植物/动物] 散布各处。顶部有大型浮雕文字“[地点名称]”。安装在带有 [边缘处理] 的 [材质] 底座上。半浮雕皮克斯粘土风格，[配色方案：单色白/鲜艳色彩]，高视觉密度，[灯光：柔和影棚/温暖金黄]，干净的商业插画美学，微缩比例魔法。 --ar 1:2
prompt_en: Detailed 3D relief diorama of [CULTURE/LOCATION] [DAILY LIFE SCENE]. Multi-layered composition with [BUILDING TYPE] featuring [ARCHITECTURAL DETAIL] in middle ground, foreground filled with [FIGURES IN TRADITIONAL DRESS] at [FOOD MARKET], [LOCAL VEHICLES] on tiny roads, [DECORATIVE CULTURAL ITEMS] and [FLORA/FAUNA] scattered throughout. Large embossed text "[LOCATION NAME]" at top. Mounted on [MATERIAL] base with [EDGE TREATMENT]. Semi-relief Pixar clay style, [COLOR SCHEME: monochrome white/vibrant colors], high visual density, [LIGHTING: soft studio/warm golden], clean commercial illustration aesthetic, miniature scale magic. --ar 1:2

title: 一张超逼真的8K人像
author: @kingofdairyque
prompt: 创作一张超逼真的8K人像，人物站在深红色背景前。她五官轮廓分明，一头凌乱的深色头发，表情自信而略带锐利。她身穿黑色西装外套，内搭白色衬衫，领口微微敞开，系着一条红色条纹网状领带。- 无限免费：戏剧性的红黑光影突显了她脸部、下颌和颈部的轮廓，营造出电影般的震撼氛围。请勿修改面部特征，并保持头部姿势不变。
prompt_en: Create an Ultra-realistic 8k portrait, standing against a deep red background. She has sharp facial features, messy styled dark hair, and a confident, slightly intense expression. She is wearing a black suits jacket over a white shirt with the collar slightly open paired with a net red stripped tie]- Unlimited Free :Dramatic red and black lighting highlights the contour of her face, jawline, and neck creating a cinematic powerful and moody atmosphere. Please do not alter facial features and leave head positioning as is.

title: 定制2025年12月挂历相框
author: Smiling Khan
prompt: “创建一幅看起来非常真实的墙壁日历：日历挂在有质感的混凝土墙上，装在一个温暖的木质相框中。上半部分展示了你上传的肖像照片，采用柔和的摄影风格，背景光线具有轻微的景深效果，皮肤色调自然，表情显得冷静而自信。下半部分则是 2025 年 12 月的日历布局，左侧是醒目的月份名称，右侧显示年份，下方有条理地对齐的日期格，周日至周六的日期都有清晰的标注。色彩以米色和棕色为主，字体设计优雅，纸张质感逼真，柔和的自然阳光投下柔和的阴影，整体呈现出高品质的生活照风格，分辨率要达到超高清水平。”
prompt_en:
Use your picture to create this image using Google Gemini Nano Banana
Prompt 👇
“Create a realistic wall calendar hanging on a textured concrete wall, framed in a warm wooden frame. The top half features my uploaded portrait photo in a soft cinematic style, shallow depth of field, warm bokeh lights in the background, natural skin tones, calm confident expression. The bottom half displays a clean, modern calendar layout for December 2025, with bold month text on the left and year on the right, neatly aligned date grid below, Sundays to Saturdays clearly labeled. Minimal beige and brown color palette, elegant typography, realistic paper texture, soft natural sunlight casting gentle shadows, premium lifestyle photography look, ultra-high resolution.”

title: 巧克力粉甜甜圈的高端静物摄影预设
author: Sharon Riley
prompt:
1) 垂直拍摄的影棚产品摄影，以上传的产品参考照片为基础，拍摄撒有巧克力粉的甜甜圈。甜甜圈居中放置在一个涂有温暖可可色的哑光圆形底座上，保持了原始产品精确的标志、文字和形状。构图严格遵循单色“同色系”美学，背景、表面和道具均采用不同深浅的棕色——从深浓咖啡色到浅拿铁色——营造出精致、富有层次感的视觉体验。甜甜圈是焦点，其顶部粉末的磨砂质感与光滑、简约的周围环境形成了触觉上的对比。
灯光设计柔和而有方向性，利用大型柔光罩将光线包裹在甜甜圈的曲线周围，同时保持微妙的阴影以勾勒其体积。背景是丰富摩卡色调的无缝纸质背景，营造出无干扰的环境，与产品的调色板和谐融合。图像采用高分辨率人像镜头拍摄，确保巧克力粉细节清晰对焦，同时让单色调融合成奶油般柔和、统一的商业编辑风格。

2) 垂直拍摄的影棚产品摄影，以上传的产品参考照片为基础，拍摄撒有巧克力粉的甜甜圈，保持了原始产品精确的形状和外观。甜甜圈居中放置，作为焦点，周围环绕着一个精致、多层次的纸艺装置。手工切割的纹理艺术纸层，采用温暖、互补的摩卡色、拿铁色、奶油色和柔和金色调，堆叠并排列成有机、波浪状的图案，围绕甜甜圈底部构建，营造出深度和精致的三维地形效果。
灯光设计精巧，使用柔和、有方向性的影棚灯，在纸层之间投射出柔和、清晰的阴影，强调了精确的切口和材料的触感。相机角度为平视直拍，捕捉到可可粉丰富的质感与纸艺光滑、哑光饰面之间的对比。画面采用垂直构图，景深较浅，确保甜甜圈清晰锐利地对焦，而周围的纸层则逐渐模糊成抽象的艺术背景，增强了场景的优质手工感。

3) 垂直拍摄的影棚产品摄影，以上传的产品参考照片为基础，拍摄撒有巧克力粉的甜甜圈，居中放置在定制的水磨石表面上，保持了原始产品精确的形状和外观。水磨石图案融合了时尚的嵌入式骨料碎片，采用烧焦橙色、森林绿、芥末黄和奶油色的柔和色调，置于温暖的米色基底中，与甜甜圈上哑光的可可粉形成了鲜明而精致的纹理对比。
环境是一个受控的影棚设置，带有 s
prompt_en:
1) Vertical studio product photography of the chocolate-dusted donut based on the upload reference photo of the product, centered on a matte, circular podium painted in a warm cocoa shade, maintaining the exact logo, text, and shape of the original product. The composition strictly adheres to a monochromatic "tone-on-tone" aesthetic, where the background, surface, and props utilize varying shades of brown—from deep espresso to light latte—to create a sophisticated, layered visual experience. The donut acts as the focal point, with the dusty texture of the topping providing a tactile contrast to the smooth, minimal surroundings.
The lighting is designed to be soft yet directional, utilizing a large diffuser to wrap light around the curves of the donut while maintaining subtle shadows that define its volume. The background is a seamless paper backdrop in a rich mocha tone, creating a distraction-free environment that blends harmoniously with the product's color palette. The image is captured with a high-resolution portrait lens, ensuring crisp focus on the chocolate powder details while allowing the monochromatic colors to melt together in a creamy, cohesive commercial editorial style.

2) Vertical studio product photography of the chocolate-dusted donut based on the upload reference photo of the product, maintaining the exact shape and appearance of the original. The donut is positioned centrally, acting as the focal point amidst an intricate, multi-layered paper craft installation. Hand-cut layers of textured art paper in warm, complementary shades of mocha, latte, cream, and muted gold are stacked and arranged in organic, wave-like patterns that build up around the base of the donut, creating depth and a sophisticated, three-dimensional topographical effect.
The lighting is expertly designed using soft, directional studio lights that cast gentle, defined shadows between the paper layers, emphasizing the precise cutouts and the tactile quality of the materials. The camera angle is straight-on at eye level, capturing the rich texture of the cocoa powder against the smooth, matte finish of the paper art. The shot is framed vertically with a shallow depth of field, ensuring the donut is in razor-sharp focus while the surrounding paper layers gradually blur into an abstract, artistic backdrop, enhancing the premium, handcrafted feel of the scene.

3) Vertical studio product photography of the chocolate-dusted donut based on the upload reference photo of the product, placed centrally on a custom-made terrazzo stone surface, maintaining the exact shape and appearance of the original product. The terrazzo pattern features a stylish mix of embedded aggregate chips in muted tones of burnt orange, forest green, mustard yellow, and cream set within a warm beige base, creating a vibrant yet sophisticated textural contrast with the matte cocoa powder on the donut.
The environment is a controlled studio setting with s

title: 黑膜泡沫洁面，焕亮肌肤笑容
author: Oogie
prompt: 一张护肤品广告，画面中一位开朗的日本年轻女模特，敷着正在 активно 起泡的黑色面膜布。柔软的白色泡沫在黑色面膜布表面形成，突出了其深层清洁功效和奢华质感。模特笑容灿烂，营造出清新、积极的氛围。她身穿白色无袖上衣，与深色面膜形成鲜明对比。她一只手拿着一个黑色光面面膜袋，设计简约现代。背景是柔和的淡蓝色，整个场景都沐浴在冷色调的专业摄影棚灯光下。整体构图干净、临床感十足且高端，凸显了发泡黑色面膜的净化效果和黑色光面产品包装的精致魅力。 --chaos 5 --ar 3:4 --raw
prompt_en: A skincare advertisement featuring a cheerful young Japanese female model wearing a black sheet mask fabric that is actively foaming. Soft white bubbles are forming across the surface of the black fabric mask, emphasizing its deep-cleansing action and luxurious texture. The model smiles brightly, creating a fresh, positive mood. She wears a white sleeveless top, providing clean contrast with the dark mask. In one hand, she holds a black glossy mask pouch with a minimal, modern design. The background is a soft pastel blue, and the entire scene is illuminated with cool-toned professional studio lighting. The overall composition is clean, clinical, and premium highlighting the purifying effect of the foaming black sheet mask and the sophisticated appeal of the black glossy product packaging. --chaos 5 --ar 3:4 --raw

title: 炫目全息时尚大片
author: @BeautyVerse_Lab

title: 2000s怀旧拼贴风明星海报设计
author: VEO Creator
prompt:
一张充满活力的 2000 年代剪贴簿风格拼贴画，其中同一个年轻男子以多个剪影姿势出现。一张居中且较大的肖像显示他戴着圆形眼镜，穿着黑色连帽衫，对着镜头比出爱心手势。其他剪影显示他蹲着，手持一台复古拍立得相机，还有一张是他吹着粉色泡泡糖泡泡。

背景看起来像一本打开的素描本，带有纹理纸张，上面布满了彩虹色调的彩色笔触、俏皮的涂鸦、箭头、星星、爱心、蝴蝶、笑脸和波普艺术贴纸。大胆、泡泡状的文字贴纸上写着“2000s Vibes”、“Dream Big”、“Be Yourself”、“Cool Dude”、“Say Cheese”和“Pop!”等短语。

整体美学风格怀旧、欢快、青春——灵感来源于 2000 年代早期的青少年杂志和剪贴簿日志。高饱和度、柔和的灯光、每个剪影周围干净的白色贴纸轮廓、异想天开而有趣的氛围、富有创意的平铺构图、数字拼贴插画风格。
prompt_en:
A vibrant 2000s scrapbook-style collage featuring the same young man in multiple cutout poses. One portrait is centered and large, showing him wearing round glasses and a black hoodie, making a finger-heart gesture toward the camera. Other cutouts show him squatting with a vintage instant camera, and another blowing a pink bubblegum bubble.  

The background looks like an open sketchbook with textured paper, filled with colorful paint strokes in rainbow tones, playful doodles, arrows, stars, hearts, butterflies, smiley faces, and pop-art stickers. Bold, bubbly typography stickers read phrases like “2000s Vibes,” “Dream Big,” “Be Yourself,” “Cool Dude,” “Say Cheese,” and “Pop!”  

The overall aesthetic is nostalgic, cheerful, and youthful — inspired by early 2000s teen magazines and scrapbook journals. High saturation, soft lighting, clean white sticker outlines around each cutout, whimsical and fun mood, creative flat-lay composition, digital collage illustration style.

title: 红发女子餐厅俏皮眨眼写真
author: Nora
